revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{1|{{{yes|<noinclude>a</noinclude>}}}}}}|<{{{tag|span}}} class="anonymous-show">{{{1|{{{yes|<noinclude>You are not logged in.</noinclude>}}}}}}</{{{tag|span}}}>}}{{#if:{{{2|{{{no|<noinclude>a</noinclude>}}}}}}|<{{{tag|span}}} class="user-show">{{{2|{{{no|<noinclude>You are currently logged in.</noinclude>}}}}}}</{{{tag|span}}}>}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#if:{{{1|{{{yes|<noinclude>a</noinclude>}}}}}}|<{{{tag|span}}} class="anonymous-show">{{{1|{{{yes|<noinclude>You are not logged in.</noinclude>}}}}}}</{{{tag|span}}}>}}{{#if:{{{2|{{{no|<noinclude>a</noinclude>}}}}}}|<{{{tag|span}}} class="user-show">{{{2|{{{no|<noinclude>You are currently logged in.</noinclude>}}}}}}</{{{tag|span}}}>}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{#if:{{{1|{{{yes|<noinclude>a</noinclude>}}}}}}|<{{{tag|span}}} class="anonymous-show">{{{1|{{{yes|<noinclude>You are not logged in.</noinclude>}}}}}}</{{{tag|span}}}>}}{{#if:{{{2|{{{no|<noinclude>a</noinclude>}}}}}}|<{{{tag|span}}} class="user-show">{{{2|{{{no|<noinclude>You are currently logged in.</noinclude>}}}}}}</{{{tag|span}}}>}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{1|{{{yes|<noinclude>a</noinclude>}}}}}}|<{{{tag|span}}} class="anonymous-show">{{{1|{{{yes|<noinclude>You are not logged in.</noinclude>}}}}}}</{{{tag|span}}}>}}{{#if:{{{2|{{{no|<noinclude>a</noinclude>}}}}}}|<{{{tag|span}}} class="user-show">{{{2|{{{no|<noinclude>You are currently logged in.</noinclude>}}}}}}</{{{tag|span}}}>}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
